name: 08_system_a_met_zero_to_one
description: Branch 3 / System A: profit-protection condition met, prev vwap_ticks=0 increments to 1, no break yet (1 < 3). System B fails (reset).
derivation: Outer guard passes (not triggered). Gate passes (weight 0.9 > 0.5 AND diff -0.5 < 0). System A: safe_hwm 4.0 >= vwap_cross_hwm_pct 2.0 (TRUE) AND current_return 2.5 < safe_hwm 4.0 (TRUE) -> condition MET. new_vwap_ticks = 0 + 1 = 1. is_vwap_broken = (1 >= VWAP_BREAK_CONFIRM_TICKS(3)) = False. System B: current_return 2.5 <= bleed_arm -1.0 is FALSE -> bleed_ticks reset to 0. Returns (1, 0, False, False).
